mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cms_category_closure (ancestor_id, descendant_id, depth) SELECT cc.ancestor_id, #{descendantId}, cc.depth + 1 FROM cms_category_closure cc WHERE cc.descendant_id = #{ancestorId} UNION ALL SELECT #{descendantId}, #{descendantId}, 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cms_category_closure WHERE ancestor_id = #{categoryId} OR descendant_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.select: SELECT descendant_id FROM cms_category_closure WHERE ancestor_id = #{categoryId} AND depth > 0
SELECT ancestor_id FROM cms_category_closure WHERE descendant_id = #{categoryId} AND depth > 0
